creator: martin@matuska.org
text:
I took a closer look, and this is a continuation of the 1.4 series
(net-im/jabber)
Maybe a new port is not really necessary - a port move seems to be a
better solution.

A patch against net-im/jabber is included.

I do want to:
- request a port move from "net-im/jabber" to "net-im/jabberd14" which
matches more closely, see project homepage as well
- change PORTNAME to "jabberd14" - the new name chosen by the authors,
or eventually to "jabberd"
- update to 1.6.0 - see attached patch or links
- request maintainership for the port

URL of the patch:
http://www.matuska.org/martin/freebsd/ports/patches/net-im_jabber.patch

URL of .tar.gz of the whole port:
http://www.matuska.org/martin/freebsd/ports/patches/net-im_jabber.tar.gz
